step_rationale: Cell-adhesion molecule; elevated in incident AMI; endothelial dysfunction and leukocyte recruitment.
mechanism: MCAM mediates leukocyte adhesion and endothelial activation, contributing to vascular inflammation during acute MI.

references.title: A Mass Spectrometry-Based Proteome Study of Twin Pairs Discordant for Incident Acute Myocardial Infarction within Three Years after Blood Sampling Suggests Novel Biomarkers.
